Looking at the activities list, there's no exact match for a daytime photography tour, so I cannot map this item.

Note: The "Scenic Photography Tour" activity doesn't have a direct match in the ground-truth ratings provided. The closest match would be "Night Photography Tour" but the package doesn't specify it's a night tour, so I'll need to exclude this from the ratings mapping.
